Fix: 

Don't know, sorry.  My plan is to wait a while, re-supp
        ports and try again...
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-2; sudo make

	no command-line tweakables were set, but /etc/make.conf says:
CFLAGS+=-g
CXXFLAGS+=-g
KERNCONF=DUNCAN

###### sup #####
SUP_UPDATE=
#
SUP=/usr/bin/csup
SUPFLAGS=-g -L 1
SUPHOST=cvsup3.freebsd.org
SUPFILE=/usr/share/examples/cvsup/standard-supfile
PORTSSUPFILE=/usr/share/examples/cvsup/ports-supfile

NO_LPR=YES
NO_SENDMAIL=YES
WITH_GTK2=yes
WITH_CUPS=yes
WITH_DEBUG=yes
#PERL_VERSION=5.8.8
A4=yes
# added by use.perl 2008-01-23 22:02:28
PERL_VER=5.8.8
PERL_VERSION=5.8.8

        I've tried building with various options enabled (like
        using the system freetype) a couple of times since 2.4
        was released, but they stopped too (not necessarily
        quite the same way as this.)
